vocab.meaning: sự nỗ lực/hoạt động đơn độc
vocab.example: I often found painting to be a deeply fulfilling solitary endeavor that allowed me to focus without any external noise.

vocab.meaning: tình bạn thân thiết, sự đồng lòng trong nhóm
vocab.example: Playing in the neighborhood football league fostered a sense of camaraderie that I found immensely rewarding.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác với bạn đồng lứa
vocab.example: While I valued my alone time, I recognized that peer interaction was crucial for developing my social confidence.

vocab.meaning: sự tập trung không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: I preferred solo activities like puzzles because they required uninterrupted focus, which was hard to achieve in a rowdy group.
Building elaborate sandcastles was a lesson in harmonious collaboration, as everyone had a specific role to play.

vocab.meaning: khép kín, ít giao tiếp xã hội
vocab.example: I wasn't necessarily socially withdrawn; I simply derived more pleasure from quiet, individual hobbies.

vocab.meaning: việc đưa ra quyết định tập thể
vocab.example: Group games taught me the art of collective decision-making, even if it meant compromising on my own preferences.
Even as a child, I was quite protective of my personal space and enjoyed retreating to my room to read.

vocab.meaning: các hoạt động mang tính định hướng đội nhóm
vocab.example: Being involved in team-oriented activities like the school choir helped me feel like part of something larger than myself.
I occasionally found a boisterous environment draining, so I would frequently opt for a peaceful walk by myself.
